parts.text:
I don't see any code or pull request for me to review. As a code reviewer, I typically analyze code changes and provide feedback on:

- Code quality and maintainability
- Potential security vulnerabilities
- Performance optimization opportunities
- Adherence to best practices
- Possible bugs or edge cases

If you'd like me to review some code, please share the code snippets or pull request details, and I'll be happy to provide a thorough analysis with constructive feedback.
